role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund invests substantially all of its assets in FLEX Options referencing the underlying ETF (SPDR® S&P 500® ETF Trust) to deliver a defined outcome. The strategy provides uncapped upside (subject to exceeding a spread) and downside protection through a 15% buffer over a one-year outcome period. The fund is non-diversified.

info.longName: AllianzIM U.S. Equity Buffer15 Uncapped Jun ETF
